name: testing-os
description: Operating system for testing in the AI era — protocols, evidence stores, and learning loops for AI-assisted software.

scripts.test:scripts: node --test scripts/sync-version.test.mjs scripts/check-doc-drift.test.mjs scripts/check-severity-contrast.test.mjs scripts/check-accent-color.test.mjs scripts/check-handbook-imagery.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run sync-version:check && npm run check-doc-drift && npm run test:scripts && npm run build && npm run test

author: mcp-tool-shop
